description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image as the default image and defines a single production stage. Add a production job that runs in the production stage, uses the ruby:latest Docker image, and is limited to the master branch. The job executes the exact shell commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=googlepay --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY, and is marked as a deploy type that deploys the app to Heroku. No caches, artifacts, or additional services are configured.
